headline: Anthropic To Become More Valuable Than Today's AMD, Sk Hynix And Micron? Crypto Prediction Market Is Fully Convinced
summary: Cryptocurrency punters are overwhelmingly betting that privately held AI company Anthropic will exceed a $1 trillion pre-IPO valuation by year-end. Anthropic Set To Enter Elite Club? Polygon (CRYPTO: POL)-based Polymarket increased odds to 99% that the San Francisco-headquartered firm will enter the “trillion-dollar club” in 2026, up from 50% a week before. The probability of Anthropic surpassing $1.1 trillion stands at 95%, while the odds of it topping $1.5 trillion have surged to 78% as of thi
